problem_description: PDF-corpus evaluation case 1. Using only the papers available through the eval web_search and search_papers tools, identify and investigate all decision-making paradigms that explain human dietary choice, valuation, reward, and self-control in food decisions. Treat the corpus as the complete literature universe: split, merge, and name paradigms according to the evidence in the papers, then carry every discovered paradigm and formulation forward.
